title: If the angels could talk baring 17 what would they say
display_title: If the angels could talk baring 17 what would they say

chunks.content:
Article: If the angels could talk baring 17 what would they say
[]: If the angels could talk (baring 17) what would they say?             Quote Post by Kaworu Nagisa » Tue Aug 08, 2006 1:22 pm ...I'll wait to see what other peeps post.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Tue Aug 08, 2006 3:20 pm "Bite me you hosers."

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Tue Aug 08, 2006 3:52 pm They're Canadian? News to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Aug 08, 2006 4:00 pm Armisael (at least) : "So Ronery!" (to coin a phrase)

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Aug 08, 2006 4:36 pm All of them stay away from Kaworu man or angel that ones a freak

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Tue Aug 08, 2006 4:49 pm Israfel: "I have a split personality."

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Aug 08, 2006 6:35 pm felineki wrote: Israfel: "I have a split personality."

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Tue Aug 08, 2006 6:56 pm Adam: I'M THE ADAM, BITCH!

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Tue Aug 08, 2006 8:42 pm sahquiel: I see you or I like to blow shit up

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Tue Aug 08, 2006 9:05 pm Gagiel: "I am the whiiite whaaale!" Matariel: "I see you!" Sahaquiel: "Where did that bowl of petunias come from?" Iruel: "OMG HAX!" Liliel: "Thomas Anderson has nothing on me!" Zeruel: "I only dress as a Gateway 2000 ad because I need the recognition."

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Tue Aug 08, 2006 9:56 pm Sachiel: Not

Article: If the angels could talk baring 17 what would they say
eruel: "I only dress as a Gateway 2000 ad because I need the recognition."

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Tue Aug 08, 2006 9:56 pm Sachiel: Not in the face! Not in the face!

[]:             Quote Post by Kaworu Nagisa » Tue Aug 08, 2006 11:17 pm Arael: "Now, tell me about your childhood..." YOU GET LOL

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Aug 08, 2006 11:40 pm BobBQ wrote: Gagiel: "I am the whiiite whaaale!"

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Wed Aug 09, 2006 8:38 am Leliel: I will always keep you in my heart. EVA-01: Nope... :twisted: * * * * * Samshel: NO! DAMMIT! I SAID "TENSHI" NOT "SUSHI"!!! (He really looks like a poor feller from a Japanese kitchen....) * * * * * Gaghiel: Hey, you there! Yes, in that kawaii red dress! Don't you wanna play "Moby Dick" with me? :twisted: EVA-02: Okay, then. Here is the bait. Swallow it. *points at the two battleships.* Gaghiel: Oh, fuck... KABOOOOOOOOOOM!!!! :twisted: * * * * * Sachiel: Dammit. I knew I should have brought my fly flapper... :evil: :twisted: * * * * * (The spider looking Angel, perhaps Matarael, dunno the name for sure): Where is the designeeeeeeeeerrr!?!?!?! ROAAAAARRR!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Mon Aug 14, 2006 7:05 pm Reichu wrote: BobBQ wrote: Gagiel: "I am the whiiite whaaale!"

[]:             Quote Post by the3rdchildren » Mon Aug 14, 2006 8:53 pm I think pretty much all of them would say: "And I'd have gotten away with it too, if it wasn't for those meddling kids!"

Article: If the angels could talk baring 17 what would they say
rdchildren » Mon Aug 14, 2006 8:53 pm I think pretty much all of them would say: "And I'd have gotten away with it too, if it wasn't for those meddling kids!"

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Mon Aug 14, 2006 10:55 pm Arael (while probing Asuka's mind): Oh yeah... Now that's a hot ceribellum!

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Tue Aug 15, 2006 12:01 am Sachiel:Aiiiieee! You one crazy ass bitch!!! Leliel: Im gonna puke... Sammael Jackson Yes they deserve to die! And i hope they burn in hell! (im clever arent i?) Zuruel: She ATE ME! THE FUCKIN BITCH ATE ME!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Tue Aug 15, 2006 5:27 am @master0rolando Or: Leliel: I'm gonna poo... Armisael: Brr... Its cold in here *merged with Ayanami* Or Armisael: *pleasant sigh* More... More... Ayanami: Okay, how about a little BLOWjob? *presses big red button* Armisael: Ah, maaan... *bumm* *If Arael would have probed Misato's mind* Arael: Naughty, naughty girl... tsk-tsk-tsk... :P Zeruel: Okay, lets see the positive side of things... I won't have a heart attack anytime soon... :P Or Zeruel: Unchain my heart!... :P Or *Zeruel, after cutting Unit-02's two hands off* Zeruel: You can leave your head on... :P EVAs to Sahaquiel (guess that was the living bomb): You're my sex bomb! Matarael (spider guy if I remember correctly): Oh, a useful closet at last... Ahh, yes... I've been keeping it for ages!

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Tue Aug 15, 2006 5:05 pm All Angels "That Tabris is one hunky slice of beefcake, I envy Shinji..."
